theme: Light mode - 'Pastel & Soft' archetype mixed with 'Neo-Brutalist' UI. This avoids the generic, immature 'baby' look while keeping the mandatory Baby Blue theme. It feels like a trendy indie game or modern streetwear brand, perfect for teenagers.

rules: Banned: Inter, Roboto, Space Grotesk, or generic sans for headings.
Currency (Gamas) numbers MUST be huge (text-5xl to text-7xl) and font-black.
Never default to bold for headers; mix font-light and font-black for tension.

colors.background: #D8EAF5 (Mandatory Baby Blue, applied to the main app body)
colors.surface: #FFFFFF (Pure white for cards/bento boxes to pop off the blue)
colors.primary: #FF5C00 (Vibrant Orange for CTAs and Gama highlights to contrast the blue)

visual_enhancers.shadows: Hard shadows ONLY (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0_#0A0A0A]). No soft, blurry shadows.
visual_enhancers.borders: Crisp 2px solid charcoal borders on all interactive elements, cards, and containers.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used EXCLUSIVELY for the Admin Password Overlay (bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-xl) to contrast with the flat brutalist UI.
visual_enhancers.textures: Add subtle grain overlay to the baby blue background to make it feel tactile (like paper or canvas).

components.buttons: Pill-shaped or rounded-lg with 2px borders, deep shadows. Hover state: -translate-y-1, increased shadow (shadow-[6px_6px_0_#0A0A0A]).
components.tabs: Pill-shaped isolated tabs. Active state gets solid #0A0A0A background and white text.
components.cards: Flat solid backgrounds, 2px dark border, no soft shadows. Internal padding MUST be generous (p-6 to p-8).
components.tables: Shadcn standard but customized. Remove soft grays, use solid borders, and a distinct header background (e.g., bg-[#D8EAF5]).
components.modals: Shadcn Dialog customized with brutalist borders and hard shadows.

grids_and_layouts.dashboard: Bento Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with gap-6. Dense layout for data, generous padding inside.
grids_and_layouts.spacing: Use p-8 or p-12 for section containers. Avoid cramped text.
grids_and_layouts.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, and dense content. Center only if it improves visual tension.

motion.interactions: Hover lifts on cards/buttons. Active states scale down (scale-95).
motion.transitions: Use Framer Motion spring animations for Gama balance changes.
motion.page_load: Staggered fade-up for list items (Framer Motion).

accessibility.contrast: Text over baby blue must be #0A0A0A. Buttons must have clear focus-visible states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='admin-login-input', data-testid='add-gamas-btn').

image_urls.description: Student reading a book, use as a thumbnail for 'Ler um texto da apostila' task.
Yellow trophy, use as hero or thumbnail for the rewards store.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup: Use .js (JSX) not .tsx. Install @phosphor-icons/react for chunkier, playful icons. Install framer-motion.
2. Layout: Create a main layout where the body background is `#D8EAF5`. Create a persistent top or side nav for Home, Benefícios, Como Ganhar, Turmas.

3. Admin Access: Include a discreet 'Admin' lock icon in the header. Clicking it opens a Glassmorphism modal requesting a password ('Rodrigo123'). On success, store admin state and show Gama management controls.
4. Turmas View: Present 3 sections/tabs for '8º ano', '9º ano', '1º colegial'. List the specific students provided in the requirements with their balances.
5. Student Detail: Clicking a student shows their 'Bank Extract' (transaction history) and balance. If admin state is active, show the 'Add/Remove Gamas' form here.
6. Gamas Form: Needs an amount input, description input, and Add/Subtract buttons. Use sonner for success/error toasts.
7. Card Design: For 'Benefícios' and 'Como Ganhar', display items as tactile trading cards using the neo-brutalist style.
8. Typography Setup: Apply 'Unbounded' font to headings and 'Figtree' to body. Ensure Gamas counters use Unbounded black weight.
9. Data: Implement FastAPI + MongoDB endpoints to fetch/update students, balances, and history. Provide a seed script for the initial students if necessary.
universal_guidelines: Do NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center }). Let the grid dictate flow.
Avoid standard 'SaaS blue' or generic styles. Maintain the high-contrast neo-brutalist edge.
Never use AI assistant emoji characters for icons; use Phosphor icons.
Ensure all components use named exports and pages use default exports.
Prioritize using existing shadcn components, but heavily customize them with border-2 border-charcoal and hard shadows.
3d_libraries: Framer Motion for 2D spring physics and layout transitions. No heavy 3D required, keeping it crisp and fast for school environments.
